headline: Chest-to-head-high S swell, offshore all morning — best day of the week, go.
today: This is the standout: 4ft-plus at 6-7s on a good angle with NNW offshore holding into the afternoon. Fire off dawn and ride it as long as the wind stays clean, tide bottoming around 11a. Shortboard or fish weather. Evening SW nudges cross-on so no need to stay late.

daysToWatch.note: Prime-angle SSE around 3ft with a light NW dawn — clean and fun before the afternoon E cross moves in. Solid backup to today.
Big on paper to near 6ft but hammered by 27-28mph N wind in the morning. It knocks slightly offshore in the afternoon, so watch for a cleaner late window if you're chasing size.
